endDateTime.description: Дата и время завершения работы стартера

jsonPath.description: json path for expected response. If you expect response body like {"field1":"value1"} you can put jsonPath = jp{body.field1}

items.description: Excepted values for jsonPath. You can use boolean, String and number values

bucket.description: The name of the S3 bucket. Can contain only lowercase letters, numbers, dots, and hyphens
